1	package inputbox
2	
3	import (
4		"fmt"
5	
6		"charm.land/bubbles/v2/help"
7		"charm.land/bubbles/v2/key"
8		"charm.land/bubbles/v2/textarea"
9		tea "charm.land/bubbletea/v2"
10		"charm.land/lipgloss/v2"
11	
12		dataautocomplete "github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/data/autocomplete"
13		"github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/tui/components/autocomplete"
14		"github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/tui/context"
15	)
16	
17	type Model struct {
18		ctx                *context.ProgramContext
19		textArea           textarea.Model
20		inputHelp          help.Model
21		prompt             string
22		autocomplete       *autocomplete.Model
23		autocompleteSource dataautocomplete.Source
24	}
25	
26	var inputKeys = []key.Binding{
27		key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("ctrl+d"), key.WithHelp("Ctrl+d", "submit")),
28		key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("ctrl+c", "esc"), key.WithHelp("Ctrl+c/esc", "cancel")),
29		autocomplete.ToggleSuggestions,
30	}
31	
32	func NewModel(ctx *context.ProgramContext) Model {
33		ta := textarea.New()
34		ta.ShowLineNumbers = true
35		ta.Prompt = ""
36		ta.CharLimit = 65536
37		base := lipgloss.NewStyle()
38		ta.SetStyles(textarea.Styles{
39			Focused: textarea.StyleState{
40				Base:       base,
41				Text:       base.Foreground(ctx.Theme.PrimaryText),
42				LineNumber: base.Foreground(ctx.Theme.FaintText),
43				CursorLine: base.Background(ctx.Theme.FaintBorder).
44					Foreground(ctx.Theme.PrimaryText),
45				CursorLineNumber: base.Foreground(ctx.Theme.SecondaryText),
46				Placeholder:      base.Foreground(ctx.Theme.FaintText),
47				EndOfBuffer:      base.Foreground(ctx.Theme.FaintText),
48			},
49		})
50		ta.Focus()
51	
52		h := help.New()
53		h.Styles = ctx.Styles.Help.BubbleStyles
54		return Model{
55			ctx:       ctx,
56			textArea:  ta,
57			inputHelp: h,
58			prompt:    "",
59		}
60	}
61	
62	func (m *Model) SetAutocomplete(ac *autocomplete.Model) {
63		m.autocomplete = ac
64	}
65	
66	func (m *Model) SetAutocompleteSource(src dataautocomplete.Source) {
67		m.autocompleteSource = src
68	}
69	
70	func (m Model) CurrentAutocompleteContext() dataautocomplete.Context {
71		if m.autocompleteSource == nil {
72			return dataautocomplete.Context{}
73		}
74	
75		return m.autocompleteSource.ExtractContext(m.textArea.Value(), m.CursorPosition())
76	}
77	
78	func (m Model) AutocompleteItemsToExclude() []string {
79		if m.autocompleteSource == nil {
80			return nil
81		}
82	
83		return m.autocompleteSource.ItemsToExclude(m.textArea.Value(), m.CursorPosition())
84	}
85	
86	func (m Model) Update(msg tea.Msg) (Model, tea.Cmd) {
87		var cmd tea.Cmd
88	
89		switch msg := msg.(type) {
90		case tea.KeyMsg:
91			// Allow toggling suggestions at any time
92			if m.autocomplete != nil && key.Matches(msg, autocomplete.ToggleSuggestions) {
93				if m.autocomplete.IsVisible() {
94					m.autocomplete.Suppress()
95					return m, nil
96				}
97	
98				m.autocomplete.Unsuppress()
99				currentContext := m.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
100				m.autocomplete.Show(currentContext.Content, m.AutocompleteItemsToExclude())
101				return m, nil
102			}
103	
104			// Allow navigation/selection even if the popup is hidden (as long as there are filtered results)
105			if m.autocomplete != nil &&
106				(m.autocomplete.IsVisible() || m.autocomplete.HasSuggestions()) {
107				switch {
108				case key.Matches(msg, autocomplete.PrevKey):
109					m.autocomplete.Prev()
110					return m, nil
111				case key.Matches(msg, autocomplete.NextKey):
112					m.autocomplete.Next()
113					return m, nil
114				case key.Matches(msg, autocomplete.SelectKey):
115					selected := m.autocomplete.Selected()
116					if selected != "" && m.autocompleteSource != nil {
117						currentValue := m.textArea.Value()
118						currentContext := m.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
119						newValue, newCursorPos := m.autocompleteSource.InsertSuggestion(
120							currentValue,
121							selected,
122							currentContext.Start,
123							currentContext.End,
124						)
125						m.textArea.SetValue(newValue)
126						m.textArea.SetCursorColumn(newCursorPos)
127						// Refresh autocomplete to exclude the newly-added item
128						if m.AutocompleteItemsToExclude() != nil {
129							newContext := m.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
130							m.autocomplete.Show(newContext.Content, m.AutocompleteItemsToExclude())
131						}
132					}
133					return m, nil
134				}
135			}
136		}
137	
138		m.textArea, cmd = m.textArea.Update(msg)
139		return m, cmd
140	}
141	
142	func (m Model) View() string {
143		return lipgloss.NewStyle().
144			BorderTop(true).
145			BorderStyle(lipgloss.NormalBorder()).
146			BorderForeground(m.ctx.Theme.SecondaryBorder).
147			MarginTop(1).
148			Render(
149				lipgloss.JoinVertical(
150					lipgloss.Left,
151					fmt.Sprintf("%s\n", m.prompt),
152					m.textArea.View(),
153					lipgloss.NewStyle().
154						MarginTop(1).
155						Render(m.inputHelp.ShortHelpView(inputKeys)),
156				),
157			)
158	}
159	
160	func (m Model) ViewWithAutocomplete() string {
161		autocompleteView := ""
162		if m.autocomplete != nil && m.autocomplete.IsVisible() {
163			autocompleteView = m.autocomplete.View()
164		}
165	
166		return lipgloss.NewStyle().
167			BorderTop(true).
168			BorderStyle(lipgloss.NormalBorder()).
169			BorderForeground(m.ctx.Theme.SecondaryBorder).
170			MarginTop(1).
171			Render(
172				lipgloss.JoinVertical(
173					lipgloss.Left,
174					fmt.Sprintf("%s\n", m.prompt),
175					m.textArea.View(),
176					autocompleteView,
177					lipgloss.NewStyle().
178						MarginTop(1).
179						Render(m.inputHelp.ShortHelpView(inputKeys)),
180				),
181			)
182	}
183	
184	func (m *Model) Value() string {
185		return m.textArea.Value()
186	}
187	
188	func (m *Model) SetValue(s string) {
189		m.textArea.SetValue(s)
190	}
191	
192	func (m *Model) Blur() {
193		m.textArea.Blur()
194	}
195	
196	func (m *Model) Focus() tea.Cmd {
197		return m.textArea.Focus()
198	}
199	
200	func (m *Model) SetWidth(width int) {
201		m.textArea.SetWidth(width)
202	}
203	
204	func (m *Model) SetHeight(height int) {
205		m.textArea.SetHeight(height)
206	}
207	
208	func (m *Model) SetPrompt(prompt string) {
209		m.prompt = prompt
210	}
211	
212	func (m *Model) Reset() {
213		m.textArea.Reset()
214	}
215	
216	func (m *Model) UpdateProgramContext(ctx *context.ProgramContext) {
217		m.ctx = ctx
218		m.inputHelp.Styles = ctx.Styles.Help.BubbleStyles
219	}
220	
221	// CursorPosition returns the cursor position within the current logical line
222	// in runes. This correctly handles multi-byte Unicode characters since the
223	// textarea internally uses rune-based positioning via [][]rune.
224	//
225	// Use this for single-line input contexts like comma-separated labels.
226	// For multi-line contexts (e.g., @mentions in comments), use GetAbsoluteCursorPosition.
227	func (m *Model) CursorPosition() int {
228		lineInfo := m.textArea.LineInfo()
229		return lineInfo.StartColumn + lineInfo.ColumnOffset
230	}

162		return tea.Batch(tea.RequestBackgroundColor, m.initScreen)
163	}

165	func (m Model) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
166		var (
167			cmd             tea.Cmd
168			tabsCmd         tea.Cmd
169			sidebarCmd      tea.Cmd
170			prViewCmd       tea.Cmd
171			issueSidebarCmd tea.Cmd
172			footerCmd       tea.Cmd
173			cmds            []tea.Cmd
174			currSection     = m.getCurrSection()
175			currRowData     = m.getCurrRowData()
176		)
177	
178		switch msg := msg.(type) {
179		case tea.KeyMsg:
180			log.Info("Key pressed", "key", msg.String())
181			m.ctx.Error = nil
182	
183			if currSection != nil && (currSection.IsSearchFocused() ||
184				currSection.IsPromptConfirmationFocused()) {
185				cmd = m.updateSection(currSection.GetId(), currSection.GetType(), msg)
186				return m, cmd
187			}
188	
189			if m.prView.IsTextInputBoxFocused() {
190				m.prView, cmd = m.prView.Update(msg)
191				m.syncSidebar()
192				return m, cmd
193			}
194	
195			if m.issueSidebar.IsTextInputBoxFocused() {
196				m.issueSidebar, cmd, _ = m.issueSidebar.Update(msg)
197				m.syncSidebar()
198				return m, cmd
199			}
200	
201			if m.footer.ShowConfirmQuit && (msg.String() == "y" || msg.String() == "enter") {
202				return m, tea.Quit
203			} else if m.footer.ShowConfirmQuit {
204				m.footer.SetShowConfirmQuit(false)
205				return m, nil
206			}
207	
208			// Handle notification PR/Issue action confirmation
209			if m.notificationView.HasPendingAction() {
210				var action string
211				m.notificationView, action = m.notificationView.Update(msg)
212				m.footer.SetLeftSection("")
213				if action != "" {
214					return m, m.executeNotificationAction(action)
215				}
216				return m, nil
217			}
218	
219			switch {
220			case m.isUserDefinedKeybinding(msg):
221				cmd = m.executeKeybinding(msg.String())
222				return m, cmd
223	
224			case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.PrevSection):
225				prevSection := m.getSectionAt(m.getPrevSectionId())
226				if prevSection != nil {
227					m.setCurrSectionId(prevSection.GetId())
228					cmd = m.onViewedRowChanged()
229				}

package detailedit

import (
	"testing"

	tea "charm.land/bubbletea/v2"
	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"

	"github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/config"
	"github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/data"
	dataautocomplete "github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/data/autocomplete"
	popupautocomplete "github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/tui/components/autocomplete"
	"github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/tui/context"
	"github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/tui/theme"
)

func newTestController(t *testing.T) Controller {
	t.Helper()

	cfg, err := config.ParseConfig(config.Location{
		ConfigFlag:       "../../../config/testdata/test-config.yml",
		SkipGlobalConfig: true,
	})
	require.NoError(t, err)

	thm := theme.ParseTheme(&cfg)
	ctx := &context.ProgramContext{
		Config: &cfg,
		Theme:  thm,
		Styles: context.InitStyles(thm),
	}

	return New(ctx)
}

func testRepo() RepoRef {
	return RepoRef{
		NameWithOwner: "owner/repo",
		Owner:         "owner",
		Name:          "repo",
	}
}

func suggestions(values ...string) []popupautocomplete.Suggestion {
	items := make([]popupautocomplete.Suggestion, 0, len(values))
	for _, value := range values {
		items = append(items, popupautocomplete.Suggestion{Value: value})
	}
	return items
}

func TestEnterCommentModeResetsAutocompleteState(t *testing.T) {
	data.ClearUserCache()
	c := newTestController(t)
	c.ac.SetSuggestions(suggestions("bug", "feature"))
	c.ac.Show("bug", nil)
	require.True(t, c.ac.HasSuggestions())

	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeComment,
		Prompt:                           "comment",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.UserMentionSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionUsers,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		ConfirmDiscardOnCancel:           true,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: true,
	})

	require.False(t, c.ac.HasSuggestions())
	require.False(t, c.ac.IsVisible())
}

func TestEnterAssignModeResetsAutocompleteState(t *testing.T) {
	data.ClearUserCache()
	c := newTestController(t)
	c.ac.SetSuggestions(suggestions("bug", "feature"))
	c.ac.Show("bug", nil)
	require.True(t, c.ac.HasSuggestions())

	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeAssign,
		Prompt:                           "assign",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.WhitespaceSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionUsers,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: false,
	})

	require.False(t, c.ac.HasSuggestions())
	require.False(t, c.ac.IsVisible())
}

func TestEnterLabelModePrepopulatesCurrentLabels(t *testing.T) {
	data.ClearLabelCache()
	c := newTestController(t)

	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeLabel,
		Prompt:                           "label",
		InitialValue:                     "bug, docs, ",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.LabelSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionLabels,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: false,
	})

	require.Equal(t, "bug, docs, ", c.inputBox.Value())
}

func TestRepoUsersFetchedUpdatesControllerState(t *testing.T) {
	c := newTestController(t)
	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeAssign,
		Prompt:                           "assign",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.WhitespaceSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionUsers,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: false,
	})

	c, _, _, handled := c.Update(
		RepoUsersFetchedMsg{Users: []data.User{{Login: "alice", Name: "Alice"}}},
	)
	require.True(t, handled)
	require.Len(t, c.repoUsers, 1)
	require.Equal(t, "alice", c.repoUsers[0].Login)
	require.True(t, c.ac.IsVisible())
}

func TestRepoLabelsFetchedUpdatesControllerState(t *testing.T) {
	c := newTestController(t)
	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeLabel,
		Prompt:                           "label",
		InitialValue:                     "bu",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.LabelSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionLabels,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: false,
	})

	c, _, _, handled := c.Update(
		RepoLabelsFetchedMsg{Labels: []data.Label{{Name: "bug", Description: "Bug"}}},
	)
	require.True(t, handled)
	require.Len(t, c.repoLabels, 1)
	require.Equal(t, "bug", c.repoLabels[0].Name)
	require.True(t, c.ac.IsVisible())
}

func TestEnterSilentFetchReturnsCommand(t *testing.T) {
	data.ClearUserCache()
	c := newTestController(t)

	_, cmd := c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeAssign,
		Prompt:                           "assign",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.WhitespaceSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionUsers,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchSilent,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: false,
	})

	require.NotNil(t, cmd)
}

func TestForceRefreshClearsRelevantCache(t *testing.T) {
	data.ClearLabelCache()
	c := newTestController(t)
	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeLabel,
		Prompt:                           "label",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.LabelSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionLabels,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: false,
	})

	_, cmd, _, handled := c.Update(popupautocomplete.FetchSuggestionsRequestedMsg{Force: true})
	require.True(t, handled)
	require.NotNil(t, cmd)
}

func TestCommentModeHidesPopupWhenMentionContextDisappears(t *testing.T) {
	data.ClearUserCache()
	c := newTestController(t)
	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeComment,
		Prompt:                           "comment",
		InitialValue:                     "@ali",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.UserMentionSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionUsers,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		ConfirmDiscardOnCancel:           true,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: true,
	})
	c.ac.SetSuggestions(suggestions("alice"))
	c.showSuggestionsFromCurrentContext()
	require.True(t, c.ac.IsVisible())

	c.inputBox.SetValue("done")
	c.showSuggestionsFromCurrentContext()
	require.False(t, c.ac.IsVisible())
}

func TestCommentModeShowsPopupForBareAtMention(t *testing.T) {
	data.ClearUserCache()
	c := newTestController(t)
	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeComment,
		Prompt:                           "comment",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.UserMentionSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionUsers,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		ConfirmDiscardOnCancel:           true,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: true,
	})
	c.ac.SetSuggestions(suggestions("alice"))

	c, _, _, handled := c.Update(tea.KeyPressMsg{Text: "@"})
	require.True(t, handled)
	require.True(t, c.ac.IsVisible())
}

func TestAssignModeShowsPopupForEmptyContext(t *testing.T) {
	data.ClearUserCache()
	c := newTestController(t)
	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeAssign,
		Prompt:                           "assign",
		InitialValue:                     "",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.WhitespaceSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionUsers,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: false,
	})
	c.ac.SetSuggestions(suggestions("alice"))
	c.showSuggestionsFromCurrentContext()

	require.True(t, c.ac.IsVisible())
}

func TestEscapeInCommentModeShowsDiscardPrompt(t *testing.T) {
	c := newTestController(t)
	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeComment,
		Prompt:                           "comment",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.UserMentionSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionUsers,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		ConfirmDiscardOnCancel:           true,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: true,
	})

	c, _, _, handled := c.Update(tea.KeyPressMsg{Text: "esc"})
	require.True(t, handled)
	require.True(t, c.showConfirmCancel)
}

func TestConfirmDiscardExitsMode(t *testing.T) {
	c := newTestController(t)
	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeApprove,
		Prompt:                           "approve",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.WhitespaceSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionUsers,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		ConfirmDiscardOnCancel:           true,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: false,
	})

	c.showConfirmCancel = true
	c, _, _, handled := c.Update(tea.KeyPressMsg{Text: "y"})
	require.True(t, handled)
	require.Equal(t, ModeNone, c.Mode())
}

func TestRejectDiscardRestoresPrompt(t *testing.T) {
	c := newTestController(t)
	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeComment,
		Prompt:                           "comment",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.UserMentionSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionUsers,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		ConfirmDiscardOnCancel:           true,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: true,
	})

	c.showConfirmCancel = true
	c, _, _, handled := c.Update(tea.KeyPressMsg{Text: "n"})
	require.True(t, handled)
	require.False(t, c.showConfirmCancel)
}

func TestCtrlDReturnsSubmit(t *testing.T) {
	c := newTestController(t)
	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeAssign,
		Prompt:                           "assign",
		InitialValue:                     "alice bob",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.WhitespaceSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionUsers,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: false,
	})

	c, _, submit, handled := c.Update(tea.KeyPressMsg{Text: "ctrl+d"})
	require.True(t, handled)
	require.Equal(t, ModeNone, c.Mode())
	require.NotNil(t, submit)
	require.Equal(t, ModeAssign, submit.Mode)
	require.Equal(t, "alice bob", submit.Value)
}

func TestUnassignModeDoesNotUseAutocomplete(t *testing.T) {
	c := newTestController(t)
	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:         ModeUnassign,
		Prompt:       "unassign",
		InitialValue: "alice\nbob",
		Repo:         testRepo(),
	})

	require.False(t, c.usesAutocomplete())
}

package detailedit

import (
	"testing"

	tea "charm.land/bubbletea/v2"
	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"

	"github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/config"
	"github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/data"
	dataautocomplete "github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/data/autocomplete"
	popupautocomplete "github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/tui/components/autocomplete"
	"github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/tui/context"
	"github.com/dlvhdr/gh-dash/v4/internal/tui/theme"
)

func newTestController(t *testing.T) Controller {
	t.Helper()

	cfg, err := config.ParseConfig(config.Location{
		ConfigFlag:       "../../../config/testdata/test-config.yml",
		SkipGlobalConfig: true,
	})
	require.NoError(t, err)

	thm := theme.ParseTheme(&cfg)
	ctx := &context.ProgramContext{
		Config: &cfg,
		Theme:  thm,
		Styles: context.InitStyles(thm),
	}

	return New(ctx)
}

func testRepo() RepoRef {
	return RepoRef{
		NameWithOwner: "owner/repo",
		Owner:         "owner",
		Name:          "repo",
	}
}

func suggestions(values ...string) []popupautocomplete.Suggestion {
	items := make([]popupautocomplete.Suggestion, 0, len(values))
	for _, value := range values {
		items = append(items, popupautocomplete.Suggestion{Value: value})
	}
	return items
}

func TestEnterCommentModeResetsAutocompleteState(t *testing.T) {
	data.ClearUserCache()
	c := newTestController(t)
	c.ac.SetSuggestions(suggestions("bug", "feature"))
	c.ac.Show("bug", nil)
	require.True(t, c.ac.HasSuggestions())

	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeComment,
		Prompt:                           "comment",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.UserMentionSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionUsers,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		ConfirmDiscardOnCancel:           true,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: true,
	})

	require.False(t, c.ac.HasSuggestions())
	require.False(t, c.ac.IsVisible())
}

func TestEnterAssignModeResetsAutocompleteState(t *testing.T) {
	data.ClearUserCache()
	c := newTestController(t)
	c.ac.SetSuggestions(suggestions("bug", "feature"))
	c.ac.Show("bug", nil)
	require.True(t, c.ac.HasSuggestions())

	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeAssign,
		Prompt:                           "assign",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.WhitespaceSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionUsers,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: false,
	})

	require.False(t, c.ac.HasSuggestions())
	require.False(t, c.ac.IsVisible())
}

func TestEnterLabelModePrepopulatesCurrentLabels(t *testing.T) {
	data.ClearLabelCache()
	c := newTestController(t)

	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeLabel,
		Prompt:                           "label",
		InitialValue:                     "bug, docs, ",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.LabelSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionLabels,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: false,
	})

	require.Equal(t, "bug, docs, ", c.inputBox.Value())
}

func TestRepoUsersFetchedUpdatesControllerState(t *testing.T) {
	c := newTestController(t)
	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeAssign,
		Prompt:                           "assign",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.WhitespaceSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionUsers,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: false,
	})

	c, _, _, handled := c.Update(
		RepoUsersFetchedMsg{Users: []data.User{{Login: "alice", Name: "Alice"}}},
	)
	require.True(t, handled)
	require.Len(t, c.repoUsers, 1)
	require.Equal(t, "alice", c.repoUsers[0].Login)
	require.True(t, c.ac.IsVisible())
}

func TestRepoLabelsFetchedUpdatesControllerState(t *testing.T) {
	c := newTestController(t)
	c, _ = c.Enter(EnterOptions{
		Mode:                             ModeLabel,
		Prompt:                           "label",
		InitialValue:                     "bu",
		Source:                           dataautocomplete.LabelSource{},
		Repo:                             testRepo(),
		SuggestionKind:                   SuggestionLabels,
		EnterFetch:                       FetchNone,
		HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty: false,
	})

	c, _, _, handled := c.Update(
		RepoLabelsFetchedMsg{Labels: []data.Label{{Name: "bug", Description: "Bug"}}},
	)
	require.True(t, handled)
	require.Len(t, c.repoLabels, 1)

func TestEnterSilentFetchReturnsCommand(t *testing.T) {
	data.ClearUserCache()
	c := newTestController(t)

content.text:
Implemented the paste fix without committing changes.

Summary:
- Bubble Tea v2 emits bracketed paste as `tea.PasteMsg`, not `tea.KeyMsg`.
- The top-level TUI was only forwarding `tea.KeyMsg` to focused PR/issue input boxes, so paste events were dropped.
- `detailedit.Controller` also only handled active input updates under `tea.KeyMsg`, so direct paste handling was missing there too.
- `inputbox.Model` now explicitly forwards `tea.PasteMsg` to the underlying `textarea`, which already supports pasted content.

Files changed:
- `internal/tui/ui.go`
- `internal/tui/components/detailedit/controller.go`
- `internal/tui/components/inputbox/inputbox.go`

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression test proving `tea.PasteMsg` failed before the fix.
- Confirmed it passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary test as requested.

Final test command passed:

```sh
go test ./internal/tui/components/detailedit ./internal/tui/components/inputbox ./internal/tui/components/prview ./internal/tui/components/issueview ./internal/tui
```
